_comment: Merge this block into .claude/settings.json (project-local, commit-safe) or ~/.claude/settings.json (global). After editing, restart Claude Code or run /hooks to reload. The 'if'-filter uses Claude Code permission-rule syntax and keeps the hook scoped to .eml/.msg files - every other Read/Edit/Grep passes straight through. Install the script itself with 'kuckuck install-claude-hook' (copies kuckuck-pseudo.sh or .ps1 into .claude/hooks/ and wires up this block idempotently).

hooks.if: Read(*.eml) | Read(*.msg) | Edit(*.eml) | Edit(*.msg) | Grep(*.eml) | Grep(*.msg)
